initiatives.name: Staten Island Mutual Aid Society
initiatives.description: A network of Staten Island residents providing direct support to neighbors in need through food distribution, resource sharing, and solidarity efforts.

initiatives.name: Staten Island Community Coalition
initiatives.description: A coalition of community organizations working to address social justice issues and build community power on Staten Island.

initiatives.name: Project Hospitality
initiatives.description: An interfaith organization providing comprehensive services to hungry, homeless, and vulnerable individuals and families on Staten Island.
